risks.title: Unauthorized access from stale identities
risks.description: Inactive workforce identities remain enabled and can be abused.

risks.title: Privilege misuse through standing access
risks.description: Persistent elevated access increases insider and credential-theft impact.

risks.title: Inability to detect malicious activity
risks.description: Insufficient log collection and monitoring delay threat detection.

risks.title: Delayed incident containment
risks.description: Missing telemetry slows investigation and containment decisions.

risks.title: Misconfiguration introduces exploitable exposure
risks.description: Uncontrolled changes diverge from hardened baselines.

risks.title: Unauthorized production change
risks.description: Changes bypass approval and create service or security risk.

risks.title: Uncoordinated incident response
risks.description: Response actions are inconsistent across teams.

risks.title: Repeat incidents due to weak remediation tracking
risks.description: Post-incident actions are not effectively tracked.

risks.title: Recovery objectives are missed
risks.description: Recovery process is not validated against business RTO/RPO.

risks.title: Ransomware blocks recovery
risks.description: Backups are unavailable, corrupted, or untested.

risks.title: Sensitive data disclosure
risks.description: Weak encryption controls expose regulated or confidential data.

risks.title: Key compromise
risks.description: Key lifecycle practices are insufficient to prevent misuse.
